decisions.title: Prioritize E2 GA blockers vs Sift Edge feature development
decisions.context: Multiple E2 GA migration issues (geomap, table sync, calc channels across runs) competing with Sift Edge GUI development. Need to decide Q2 engineering allocation between stabilizing Explore V2 for GA vs advancing Edge capabilities.

arguments.for: E2 GA directly serves 'Nail the Core' pillar and unblocks enterprise expansion. Edge can follow in Q3.
arguments.against: Sift Edge live query engine (ENG-9082) is critical for 'Build the Moat' differentiation and early customer commitments exist.

decisions.title: Resolve SCIM user deactivation issue before enterprise renewals
decisions.context: ENG-9707 shows SCIM users randomly deactivated despite active IdP groups. Three enterprise customers affected. Renewal conversations start April 15th. Could impact 'Embed Deeper' retention metrics.
decisions.blockedBy: AWS Identity Center SCIM implementation (ENG-5178) needs completion first to validate root cause

arguments.for: Customer trust issue with immediate revenue risk. Must fix before renewals.
arguments.against: Workaround exists via manual re-activation. Focus on E2 GA may deliver more value.

decisions.title: Accelerate Canvas multi-run calculated channels to beta
decisions.context: DES-152 and DES-149 show UX research for multi-run calcs and run-to-run rules. These unlock cross-test analysis workflows central to 'Decisions Captured Per Customer' north star. Need to commit timeline.

arguments.for: Directly increases decisions per customer by enabling comparative analysis. Research cohort ready (ENG-9123).
arguments.against: Core E2 table/sync issues (ENG-9643, ENG-9709, ENG-8756) hurt existing user experience and should be fixed first.

decisions.title: Define L0 filesystem architecture before Rust migration
decisions.context: ENG-9666 creating Rust struct for L0 filesystem alongside ENG-9655 per-org memtable management. Need architectural decision on storage layer rewrite scope to avoid rework.

arguments.for: Rust rewrite enables 10x performance improvements for 'Build the Moat' differentiation.
arguments.against: Premature optimization risk. Focus on product-layer innovations with faster time-to-value.
